channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

item.title: The Times: Burnham confirms he will run for Labour leadership - The Times
item.description: Burnham confirms he will run for Labour leadership - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Makerfield by-election debate live: Burnham announces he will challenge Starmer as first hustings begins
item.description: Makerfield by-election debate live: Burnham announces he will challenge Starmer as first hustings begins

item.title: LabourList: Andy Burnham announces he will challenge Starmer for leadership of the Labour Party if elected in Makerfield
item.description: Andy Burnham announces he will challenge Starmer for leadership of the Labour Party if elected in Makerfield

item.title: BBC Politics: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM
item.description: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform’s Andrea Jenkyns storms out of meeting after discussion of Henry Nowak murder
item.description: Reform’s Andrea Jenkyns storms out of meeting after discussion of Henry Nowak murder

item.title: ITVX: Starmer: 'Difficult questions' over police handling of Henry Nowak's murder - ITVX
item.description: Starmer: 'Difficult questions' over police handling of Henry Nowak's murder - ITVX

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘It is unsustainable’: Reform’s billionaire donors inspire panic in Westminster
item.description: ‘It is unsustainable’: Reform’s billionaire donors inspire panic in Westminster

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer accuses Musk of trying to ‘whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak murder
item.description: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to ‘whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak murder

item.title: ITVX: Starmer accuses Musk of 'trying to whip up division' over Henry Nowak's murder - ITVX
item.description: Starmer accuses Musk of 'trying to whip up division' over Henry Nowak's murder - ITVX

item.title: The Guardian: Why is Andy Burnham talking about fixing England’s social care system? - The Guardian
item.description: Why is Andy Burnham talking about fixing England’s social care system? - The Guardian
